note: Views Infinite Scroll is configured entirely inside a View's pager settings (no admin page, no permissions), so all cases are `recipe` (response-graded), not `execution` (live-state).

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with the Views Infinite Scroll module enabled, I have a View listing that currently uses numbered pages. How do I switch it to infinite scroll? Describe where in the View I make the change.
evals.expected_output: In the View's Pager settings, click the current pager (Full / Mini) and choose the 'Infinite Scroll' (infinite_scroll) pager plugin. There is no admin settings page.

evals.prompt: Does Views Infinite Scroll replace the mini or full Views pager, or is it a separate kind of feature? Explain what it actually is.
evals.expected_output: It is a Views pager plugin (infinite_scroll) that you select in the Pager settings instead of the 'Full' or 'Mini' pager. It requires a Views pager slot.

evals.prompt: I selected the Infinite Scroll pager on my View but new results are not loading when I scroll. What View setting is required for it to work?
evals.expected_output: The View must have AJAX enabled (Advanced → Use AJAX = Yes). The pager cannot append pages without it; the View edit form warns you if AJAX is off.

evals.prompt: Using the Views Infinite Scroll pager, I want the next page of results to load automatically as the user scrolls to the bottom, rather than requiring a button click. Which pager option controls this?
evals.expected_output: Set the 'automatically_load_content' option to TRUE so the next page loads automatically on scroll; when FALSE, content only loads on button click.

evals.prompt: I want to change the text on the Views Infinite Scroll 'load more' button to say 'Show more articles'. Which pager option do I set?
evals.expected_output: Set the 'button_text' pager option to the desired label, e.g. 'Show more articles'.

evals.prompt: With Views Infinite Scroll, if a user deep-links directly to page 3 of the listing, I want all earlier pages loaded on initial render too. Which pager option enables that?
evals.expected_output: Enable the 'initially_load_all_pages' option to load all pages up to the current one on initial render (useful for deep-linking to a later page).

evals.prompt: I want to override the JavaScript that Views Infinite Scroll uses to fetch and append the next page. What is the module's library, and how do I replace its script?
evals.expected_output: The library is views_infinite_scroll/views-infinite-scroll (js/infinite-scroll.js, depends on core/jquery, core/once, core/drupal, core/drupal.debounce and views/views.ajax). Override it in your theme's *.libraries.yml via libraries-override with your own script.

evals.prompt: How do I customize the markup of the Views Infinite Scroll pager (the wrapper and button) in my theme? Name the template.
evals.expected_output: Override the templates/views-infinite-scroll-pager.html.twig template in your theme; hook_preprocess_views_infinite_scroll_pager() computes the next link and attributes.
